title: Complete Chaos
description: This mod edits the world to create a totally new game experience... a very chaotic one!
body:
**Complete Chaos totally changes Vanilla Minecraft as you know it.**

Mine a grassblock... get TNT!?!
Mine a log... and suddenly there are Creepers nearby!
Mine Leaves and.... redstone dust?
What happens if I mine redstone?
Waht happens if I mine stone, or iron, or...?!?
How do I get a stick???

**Everything is new.**

This mod does not add any new blocks, or mobs, or textures.
It dos add a couple new villager trades and recipies.

I highly recomend playing with the most current version as I am still adding features, fixing bugs, and tweaking the gameplay as I test and get feedback.

But mostly, it just turns the table on what happens as you interact with the world.
The changes are not random. I have carefully made over 200 changes to the game that should be somewhat balanced, but still playable and even beatable. So every important item is still obtainable.

Important: Do not ADD this mod to a world that you care about such as an existing modpack that yo've invested a lot of time in. Complete Chaos will add large explosions, spawn in large random structures, destroy items and just casue general chaos!

Why would you play this?
For fun! To play through the game where everything must be relearned is refreshing, and also hilarous both to play or to watch a friend play! I watched my two kids beta test this and spent a solid hour laughing.

Interested in making a trailer for this mod? I'll be hapy to embed it here if you do, just let me know. It shoudl make for some great content.

Also available on Curseforge.
